mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, nickname, avatar_url, role, identity_type, high_school, target_uni_id, current_uni_id, profile_completed, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT id, username, nickname, avatar_url, role, identity_type, high_school, target_uni_id, current_uni_id, profile_completed, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET nickname = #{nickname}, identity_type = #{identityType}, high_school = #{highSchool}, target_uni_id = #{targetUniId}, current_uni_id = #{currentUniId}, profile_completed = #{profileCompleted} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
